source: User request: folder-by-feature repo structure. Run: LINEAR_API_KEY=xxx node scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs --input docs/backlog/folder-by-feature-tickets.json --team-key ANM

tickets.title: [X Platform] Restructure repo to folder-by-feature (apps contain everything)
tickets.description:
## Summary
Restructure the monorepo from `apps/` + `services/` split to a folder-by-feature layout where `apps/` contains everything. Each app is self-contained with its frontend, backend, and deployment declarations.

## Current state
- `apps/`: user-facing apps (e.g. cloud-console)
- `services/`: APIs, workers, backends (omnichannel, access-api) — a "god-level" services folder

## Target state
- `apps/`: one folder per feature/app
- Each app folder contains:
  - Frontend (Next.js, etc.)
  - Backend/API (Go, etc.) when applicable
  - Deployment declarations for each deployable (e.g. Vercel for frontend, Fly/Railway/Cloud Run for API)
- No top-level `services/` folder — services are colocated with their apps

## Example target layout
```
apps/
  cloud-console/
    frontend/          # or . if single frontend
    deployments/      # vercel.json, etc.
  omnichannel/
    frontend/
    backend/
    deployments/      # frontend → Vercel, backend → ?
  access-api/
    api/              # Go API
    deployments/     # API target
```

## Acceptance criteria
- All deployables live under `apps/<feature>/`
- Each app declares its deployment targets (Vercel, etc.) in a consistent way
- Remove or deprecate the top-level `services/` folder
- Update platform-cli, scripts/verify, deploy-preflight, CI, and docs to reflect new paths
- Nx/workspace config updated for new layout

## Risks / dependencies
- Large refactor; requires coordinated migration of paths, imports, and tooling
- Platform CLI and dev-stack may need significant updates
